properties.query: select a.id as attendance_id, a.student_id, u.name as student_name, a.session_id, s.course_id, c.title as course_title, s.title as session_title, s.week, a.attendance_status, a.checked_at from attendance a join users u on a.student_id = u.id join sessions s on a.session_id = s.id join courses c on s.course_id = c.id order by a.id

select a.id as attendance_id, a.student_id, u.name as student_name, a.session_id, s.course_id, c.title as course_title, s.title as session_title, s.week, a.attendance_status, a.checked_at from attendance a join users u on a.student_id = u.id join sessions s on a.session_id = s.id join courses c on s.course_id = c.id where s.course_id = ? order by a.id

select a.id as attendance_id, a.student_id, u.name as student_name, a.session_id, s.course_id, c.title as course_title, s.title as session_title, s.week, a.attendance_status, a.checked_at from attendance a join users u on a.student_id = u.id join sessions s on a.session_id = s.id join courses c on s.course_id = c.id where s.week = ? order by a.id

select a.id as attendance_id, a.student_id, u.name as student_name, a.session_id, s.course_id, c.title as course_title, s.title as session_title, s.week, a.attendance_status, a.checked_at from attendance a join users u on a.student_id = u.id join sessions s on a.session_id = s.id join courses c on s.course_id = c.id where a.attendance_status = ? order by a.id

select a.id as attendance_id, a.student_id, u.name as student_name, a.session_id, s.course_id, c.title as course_title, s.title as session_title, s.week, a.attendance_status, a.checked_at from attendance a join users u on a.student_id = u.id join sessions s on a.session_id = s.id join courses c on s.course_id = c.id where a.student_id = ? order by s.start_at
select id, title from courses where professor_id = ? order by id

select a.id as attendance_id, a.student_id, u.name as student_name, a.session_id, s.course_id, c.title as course_title, s.title as session_title, s.week, a.attendance_status, a.checked_at from attendance a join users u on a.student_id = u.id join sessions s on a.session_id = s.id join courses c on s.course_id = c.id where s.course_id = ? and c.professor_id = ? order by s.week, u.name

select a.id as attendance_id, a.student_id, u.name as student_name, a.session_id, s.course_id, c.title as course_title, s.title as session_title, s.week, a.attendance_status, a.checked_at from attendance a join users u on a.student_id = u.id join sessions s on a.session_id = s.id join courses c on s.course_id = c.id where s.week = ? and c.professor_id = ? order by c.title, u.name

select a.id as attendance_id, a.student_id, u.name as student_name, a.session_id, s.course_id, c.title as course_title, s.title as session_title, s.week, a.attendance_status, a.checked_at from attendance a join users u on a.student_id = u.id join sessions s on a.session_id = s.id join courses c on s.course_id = c.id where s.course_id = ? and c.professor_id = ? and s.week = ? order by u.name

select a.id as attendance_id, a.student_id, u.name as student_name, a.session_id, s.course_id, c.title as course_title, s.title as session_title, s.week, a.attendance_status, a.checked_at from attendance a join users u on a.student_id = u.id join sessions s on a.session_id = s.id join courses c on s.course_id = c.id where s.course_id = ? and c.professor_id = ? and a.attendance_status = ? order by s.week, u.name
select c.id, c.title from enrollments e join courses c on e.course_id = c.id where e.user_id = ? order by c.id

select a.id as attendance_id, a.student_id, u.name as student_name, a.session_id, s.course_id, c.title as course_title, s.title as session_title, s.week, a.attendance_status, a.checked_at from attendance a join users u on a.student_id = u.id join sessions s on a.session_id = s.id join courses c on s.course_id = c.id where a.student_id = ? and s.course_id = ? order by s.week
update attendance set attendance_status = ? where id = ?

select s.id as session_id, s.course_id, c.title as course_title, s.week, s.start_at, s.end_at from enrollments e join courses c on e.course_id = c.id join sessions s on c.id = s.course_id where e.user_id = ? and ( ( now() >= date_sub(s.start_at, interval 10 minute) AND now() <= s.end_at ) or ( s.course_id = 1 and s.week = 15 ) ) order by s.start_at
select id, student_id, session_id, attendance_status, checked_at from attendance where student_id = ? and session_id = ?
insert into attendance ( student_id, session_id, attendance_status, checked_at ) values ( ?, ?, ?, now() )
update attendance set attendance_status = ?, checked_at = now() where id = ?
select id as session_id, course_id, week, start_at, end_at from sessions where course_id = ? order by week
update attendance set attendance_status = 'EXCUSED_PENDING' where student_id = ? and session_id = ?
